creator: kristinacors
caption: What’s the first thing you notice when a hotel is actually luxury? Let me know in the comments! #travelbucketlist #travelcontentcreator #luxurytravel #luxuryhotel #hamiltonisland

transcription.text: Luxury hotels for people who don't do ordinary. This hotel on Hamilton Island in the Whitsundays is one of the most Exclusive hotels in the world in one of the most breath-snatching settings imaginable I don't know about you, but I can't get over this pocket of paradise. I mean look at this serene pavilion I'm obsessed with the natural tone furnishings the warm wood the open design set against the shimmering Whitsundays Backdrop, it's literally sensory seduction And then there's an infinity pool with a sky and sea blur and your only Responsibility is to float and feel if you have time Definitely slip into the spa for a signature massage or a moment of stillness that will genuinely alter your body chemistry If you're in the mood for adventure head to Whitehaven Beach Often ranked as one of the most beautiful beaches in the world or take a scenic flight over the Great Barrier Reef the name of This luxury hotel is qualia by the way qualia is Greek for a deep multisensory experience And being here it's hard to disagree with that follow to discover more luxury hotels and bucket list experiences like this around the world
